---
title: "promotion_registry.py"
path: "C:\Users\Craig\Corvus\CorvusStar\src\core\promotion_registry.py"
loc: 42
complexity: 5
logic_score: 7.10
style_score: 3.85
intel_score: 1.40
overall_score: 3.00
---

## Intent
The `promotion_registry.py` sector implements modular logic focusing on PromotionRegistry, __init__, _load_registry, _save_registry, _get_hash, register_promotion, is_verified. It forms a node in the Gungnir Matrix.

## Interaction Protocol
Integrate via PromotionRegistry, __init__, _load_registry, _save_registry, _get_hash, register_promotion, is_verified. Follow the Linscott Standard for this sector.

## Gungnir Matrix Breakdown
- **Logic [L]**: 7.1/10
- **Style [S]**: 3.9/10
- **Intel [I]**: 1.4/10
- **Gravity [G]**: 5 interactions (Agent Activity Hotspot)



## Neural Pathways

### Imports
- [hashlib](file://hashlib)
- [json](file://json)
- [datetime](file://datetime)
- [pathlib](file://pathlib)

### Exports
- `PromotionRegistry`
- `__init__`
- `_load_registry`
- `_save_registry`
- `_get_hash`
- `register_promotion`
- `is_verified`
